package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
)

// scenario for json_valid_then_unmarshal: Code that validates JSON and then unmarshals the same payload again.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule610NegativeRecord struct { Name string `json:"name"`; Count int `json:"count"` }

func scenario610Negative(writer io.Writer, value Rule610NegativeRecord) error {
	return json.NewEncoder(writer).Encode(value)
}
